# CWE-488 negative: cart bound to validated session cookie (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-488-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func ViewCart(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid, err := r.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid.Value != r.Header.Get("X-Session-ID") {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	items, _ := r.Context().Value("cart").([]string)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{"items": items})
}

func AddCartItem(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid, err := r.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid.Value != r.Header.Get("X-Session-ID") {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	items, _ := r.Context().Value("cart").([]string)
	items = append(items, r.FormValue("sku"))
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]int{"count": len(items)})
}
